definition.procedurexml: <xml xmlns="https://developers.google.com/blockly/xml"><variables><variable type="Number" id="sumPassiveHealthRegeneration">sumPassiveHealthRegeneration</variable></variables><block type="event_trigger" deletable="false" x="49" y="45"><field name="trigger">no_ext_trigger</field><next><block type="controls_if"><value name="IF0"><block type="entity_haspotioneffect"><field name="potion">CUSTOM:ChemicalDOT</field><value name="entity"><block type="entity_from_deps"></block></value></block></value><statement name="DO0"><block type="wait"><value name="ticks"><block type="math_number"><field name="NUM">20</field></block></value><statement name="do"><block type="controls_if"><value name="IF0"><block type="logic_negate"><value name="BOOL"><block type="entity_haspotioneffect"><field name="potion">CUSTOM:ChemicalDOTCooldown</field><value name="entity"><block type="entity_from_deps"></block></value></block></value></block></value><statement name="DO0"><block type="entity_add_potion"><field name="potion">CUSTOM:ChemicalDOTCooldown</field><value name="level"><block type="math_number"><field name="NUM">0</field></block></value><value name="duration"><block type="math_number"><field name="NUM">40</field></block></value><value name="entity"><block type="entity_from_deps"></block></value><next><block type="deal_damage"><value name="amount"><block type="math_number"><field name="NUM">1</field></block></value><value name="entity"><block type="entity_from_deps"></block></value><value name="damagesource"><block type="damagesource_from_type"><field name="damagetype">MAGIC</field></block></value></block></next></block></statement><next><block type="call_procedure"><field name="procedure">ChemicalDOTEffectStarted</field></block></next></block></statement></block></statement></block></next></block></xml>
